meaning: n.[昆]水虿(鱼蛉等的幼虫,常用作钓饵)
examples: Mr. Dobson promised to widen the organization's scope of activity.
Messrs Ford and Dobson are piano repairers.
By the time Dobson got off, the man was in tears.
Head of youth development Richard Dobson will take caretaker charge for Saturday's game with Gillingham.
Along the way he's tackled issues with Frank Dobson, Mo Mowlam, and Charles Kennedy.
